textByHashes.c6a926a94f816eaf168eb59e71b236636a35ecc1: The... the noise! Her voice in my head for so long, and now... silence! It's so loud! Please, we must leave!
textByHashes.a9ac8dd34d5c85b984ca5eb81eaba91df6b67e2f: The silence... it's so loud! Free the others! Free them and we can help. Now please... go!
textByHashes.ab8e1b96fb840d34b6078c4f8009dcd371d106bb: We... opened the way. Now... go. Stop her! Please!
